TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Cory Blackwell nalecuhan i Chicago, Illinois, nanu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput, pahanhanan tu kawaw ayza. Seattle SuperSonics i 1984 a mihcan NBA sapapili' mimaliay a kawaw, saka 2 ku uwac atu silsil 28, namapili' tu nu San Diego Rockets putiput. 3 bulad 27 demiad, 1963 a mihca, Cory Blackwell, miunduay.
S.PHON: ¶orj br~…æa ¶kw…ôr~…ær~…æ nar~…æ…ô ¶uƒßan i ¶ƒßi ¶ago, ir~…ær~…æinois, nanu sjubaj kanas-mar~…æi miunduaj nu amir~…æika nba nisakaput, paƒßanƒßanan tu kawaw ajza. s…ôattr~…æ…ô sup…ôrsoni ¶s i **** a miƒß ¶an nba sapapir~…æi î~ ° mimar~…æiaj a kawaw, saka * ku uwa ¶ atu sir~…æsir~…æ **, namapir~…æi î~ ° tu nu san di…ôgo *o ¶k…ôts putiput. * bur~…æad ** d…ômiad, **** a miƒß ¶a, ¶orj br~…æa ¶kw…ôr~…ær~…æ, miunduaj.
S.FORM: Cory Blackwell nalecuhan i Chicago, Illinois, nanu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput, pahanhanan tu kawaw ayza. Seattle SuperSonics i 1984 a mihcan NBA sapapili' mimaliay a kawaw, saka 2 ku uwac atu silsil 28, namapili' tu nu San Diego Rockets putiput. 3 bulad 27 demiad, 1963 a mihca, Cory Blackwell, miunduay.
